## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Type-check passes (`uv run mypy solver`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`uv run ruff check solver tests`)
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md if user-facing
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior or API changed
